report: Hydraulic line pressure slowly declined by 12 psi over four hours. No visible fluid was found during inspection.
evidence: pressure declined by 12 psi over four hours
recommended_action: perform a controlled leak test and inspect valves, fittings, and sensor calibration

report: Pump discharge pressure dropped from 145 psi to 82 psi within two minutes of startup. Oil is visible around the output shaft seal.
evidence: discharge pressure fell from 145 psi to 82 psi
oil visible around output shaft seal
recommended_action: shut down and inspect the seal assembly before restart
review_notes: Direct evidence supports a seal leak.

report: Pump pressure oscillates between 70 and 110 psi and a rattling sound is present near the inlet. Reservoir level is below minimum.
recommended_action: stop the pump, restore fluid level, and inspect the inlet path
